overall_summary: Bob's Red Mill Wheat Bran is a health-focused, fiber-rich product positioned in the mid-range price segment. The packaging highlights its natural and non-GMO attributes, appealing to health-conscious consumers. The 16oz size offers good value for a specialty grain product, with usage versatility in baking and cereals. The brand's reputation for quality and employee-owned status adds to its premium perception.

catalog_content:
Item Name: NY SPICE SHOP Whole Dried Cherries - 16 Ounces Dark Sweet Cherries - Dried Dark Sweet Cherries - Fresh Dried Fruit - No Added Sugar, Sunrise Fresh Dried Fruit - No Preservatives Bullet Point 1: INGREDIENTS LIST OF WHOLE DRIED CHERRIES - Natural Cherries. **(MAY CONTAIN OCCASIONAL PIT FRAGMENT)** Packaged in the same facility as peanuts, tree nuts, wheat, soy, and milk products. Bullet Point 2: FRESH DRIED FRUIT BY NY SPICE SHOP - Great taste and high nutritional value make our dried cherries one of the most popular choices for many recipes. A great add on to your yogurt, oatmeal and salads. Try them in your favorite recipe! Add dried fruit to savory salads or pastas. Spoon into fruit fillings for pastries or pies. Dried Dark Sweet Cherries have a more distinctive taste profile that varies between a sweet and a tart flavor, which our dried cherries retain. Bullet Point 3: SUN DRIED NATURAL DRIED FRUIT - The “fire engine red” cherries that everyone loves so much are also one of our favorites. They are dried to perfection and can be used in almost any type of recipe. The cherries earthy flavor makes them a perfect ingredient for both sweet and savory dishes. Use cherries in pastry, custard, chutneys and dessert sauce. Works well with venison, duck and pork dishes. Dried Dark Sweet Cherries are the “fire engine red” cherries everyone knows and loves! Bullet Point 4: NATURAL GOOD QUALITY DRIED DARK SWEET CHERRIES - Put a few in your yogurt or trail mix. Make them a part of your breakfast by adding them to your cereal or oatmeal. Dark sweet cherries are naturally sweet when dried. They are a lusciously sweet addition to both savory and sweet dishes, and they provide a welcome, slightly tarter substitution for raisins. The health benefits of our Dark Sweet cherries are extensive. All natural, home grown cherries that will surely delight. Bullet Point 5: HIGH QUALITY CHERRIES BY NY SPICE SHOP - Dried cherries are fresh cherries that have been dehydrated, and may or may not contain added sugar. Most commercially dried cherries are tart, rather than sweet cherries, because the tart variety tends to fare better in cooking, freezing, canning and drying processes. Our Dried Dark Sweet Cherries are a household favorite- great as a snack, the perfect addition to morning breakfasts in oatmeal or yogurt and a great ingredient for baking! Product Description: ATTRACTIVE, FRESH, AND INSTANTLY MOUTHWATERING, OUR DRIED CHERRIES ARE A DELECTABLE TREAT FOR ANY OCCASION. EACH SMALL, RED CHERRY CARRIES ITSELF WITH A VIBRANT FLOURISH AND POSSESSES AN ENCHANTING FLAVOR.

PREMIUM DRIED CHERRIES WILL MAKE YOUR TASTE BUDS GO WILD!
